CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-02-2006 Continued To Aug-08-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-06-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the Record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sara Lerschen.
Gilbert Purcell, Esq. for Plaintiff: Victor Amenta, not present.
Jeffery Fadeff, Esq. for Defendant: J.T. Thorp, not present.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Parties stipulated for a Judgement in favor of the Plaintiff in the amount of $105,319.28, stayed until the 2nd week of May.
Matter is deemed settled, trial vacated, and placed on the CRC-225 Calendar in Dept. 212 for on June 6, 2006 at 10:00 A.M. for Dimissal or for Judgment.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2006 Set For Trial On Apr-24-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
